name: image-describer
description: Describe image content and extract text from images using AI vision

tools.title: Get Image Data
tools.description: Read an image file and return its metadata (file name, MIME type, size, dimensions for PNG/JPEG). Set includeBase64=true to get base64-encoded image data for multimodal vision model input.

actions.title: Describe Image
actions.description: Generate a detailed description of the image content

actions.title: Extract Text (OCR)
actions.description: Extract all text visible in the image
